visual_description: A person with dark, shoulder-length hair, wearing a dark blue jacket over a light-colored turtleneck, is partially visible peeking from behind a white, vertically-paneled door or wall. Their hands are clasped together near their chest, and their head is slightly tilted as they look toward the camera. The setting appears to be an indoor space with plain, somewhat stained walls and a tiled baseboard.
